case_title: ALVARO FRIAS VS. NICHOLAS ALEXANDER PARKER FOSTER

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,626.44 FILED BY FRIAS, ALVARO AS TO DEFENDANT FOSTER, NICHOLAS ALEXANDER PARKER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
